Modern social-first product photography handheld camera trailing SCARLETT in clean white tank top stepping onto the wide promenade mid-stride with tensed muscles glancing back over shoulder, dynamic beach background of surfers carving white lines across blue water with open ocean views and pale sand underfoot, bright natural morning light with clean directional shadows and breezy wind motion, crisp white tones and sea blues dominating the palette, high-key airy atmosphere with subtle warmth in highlights, shallow depth of field emphasizing the figure against energetic coastal expanse, editorial energy from slightly behind and to the side framing

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - Wide beach promenade with wind
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
